shortSummary: #1 PvE build in 2026. Full 6-piece Striker with St. Elmo's Engine. Reach 60% Crit Chance then stack Crit Damage. Striker chest extends max stacks to 200.

Chest talent Press the Advantage extends the cap to 200 stacks. St. Elmo's Engine synergises perfectly. Coyote's Mask provides group-wide crit buff. Goal: hit 60% Crit Chance cap, then go all-in on Crit Damage.

shortSummary: The essential raid tank for Operation Iron Horse. 2.6M armor, shares 50% with teammates. Mandatory role for the Morozova fight. One of 2 tanks the raid requires.
description: Operation Iron Horse final boss requires exactly 2 tank builds. This Key Tank role: hold aggro on Colonel Morozova, collect keys from heavy enemies, share armor with the team. Foundry Bulwark 4pc provides explosive resistance and team armor sharing via Perfect Vanguard talent (Backpack): kills grant 15% of your max armor as bonus armor to nearby allies. With 2.6M total armor, that's 390K bonus armor per kill shared to every teammate. Sharpshooter spec passively boosts total armor by 10%. Aegis 2pc adds 15% bonus total armor. Result: unkillable while being the team's primary tank. Tardigrade Armor System chest is alternative for the Stagger Tank role.
author: Sgt. Greybeard

shortSummary: The only viable full healer for Operation Iron Horse. 4pc Future Initiative + Alps + Murakami. Must keep tank alive vs Williams and coordinate team heals on Morozova split-phase.
description: Iron Horse healer is not optional — the raid requires constant team heals that no DPS build can provide as a side role. Future Initiative 4pc: healing a teammate triggers a burst that heals ALL nearby allies. Alps Integration backpack: +20% Repair Skills (heals stronger). Murakami Industries chest: +20% Skill Duration (longer heal uptime). Demolitionist spec is chosen for Incombustible talent: immunity to burn status from Morozova's fire attacks, which would otherwise interrupt heals. All 6 cores are blue (Skill Tier). Capacitor charges heal cooldowns between uses. One healer per 4-man group minimum.

shortSummary: The top solo Legendary build in 2026. Striker stacks + Memento armor scaling = you become harder to kill the more you kill. Frontline playstyle. Carries solo Strongholds consistently.
description: Striker's Gamble 4pc stacks up to 200 hits of +1% weapon damage (with Press the Advantage chest) = +200% weapon damage at max. Memento backpack: each kill adds armor trophy stacks up to +50% max armor. The result: as fights get longer and kill chains extend, you simultaneously deal more damage AND become harder to kill. Demolitionist spec provides incendiary grenades for room clearing, Striker Drone signature, and +10% explosive damage passive. Crusader Shield skill absorbs incoming damage and lets you walk through cover to maintain Striker stacks without breaking stride. Best Legendary mission loadout in the current meta.

shortSummary: Diamondback exotic rifle guarantees a critical hit on the next shot after a kill. Combined with Negotiator's Dilemma spreading 100% of crit damage to marked enemies — every shot crits, every crit spreads. Insane AoE damage.
description: Diamondback exotic rifle: after every kill, the next shot is a guaranteed critical hit with +100% damage bonus. Negotiator's Dilemma 4pc: Hostile Negotiations marks enemies on crit. When a marked enemy takes damage, 60% spreads to all other marked enemies (100% with Critical Measures chest). Combined: kill → guaranteed crit → marks new enemy → crit spreads to all marked targets → chain kills. Critical Hit Chance cap at 60% becomes trivial because Diamondback guarantees crits on kills. Sharpshooter provides +10% headshot damage and Sniper signature for long-range priority target elimination.

shortSummary: Status effects carry Legendary content. Eclipse Protocol Spread auto-transfers status to entire rooms. Scorpio applies 4 status effects in one shot. Firewall passive adds +25% skill damage when you have a status on yourself.
description: Eclipse Protocol Legendary variant focuses on immunity and infinite status uptime rather than raw DPS. Legendary has waves of enemies with high armor — status effects bypass armor scaling entirely. Vile Mask adds stacking poison DoT to every status-affected enemy. Spread talent auto-transfers to all enemies within 8m. Chem Launcher Oxidizer corrodes elite armor, reducing it over time for DPS teammates. Firewall spec grants: Flamethrower signature (instant AoE burn), burn immunity (Incombustible passive), and +25% skill damage while you have a status effect on yourself — stand in your own fire for the buff. Best team contribution in Legendary: 1 Eclipse player buffs the entire team by marking/corroding every enemy.

shortSummary: Underused support build that makes your whole team do more damage. Ongoing Directive drops Hollow-Point ammo on status kills — Hollow-Point ammo causes bleed and amplifies weapon damage for any teammate who picks it up.
description: Ongoing Directive 4pc: status effect kills drop Hollow-Point ammo packs. Any teammate who picks up Hollow-Point ammo deals bonus weapon damage and applies bleed on hit. In an 8-man raid, one OD player can keep the entire team supplied with Hollow-Point ammo indefinitely via status effect + kill chains. Bluescreen LMG applies status effects (shock + blind) on hit — perfect OD trigger weapon. Vanguard backpack talent: kills grant 15% of your armor as bonus armor to teammates. Combined result: you are simultaneously a team DPS amplifier and team survivability support. Underrated in the meta — most teams don't bring one and notice the DPS difference immediately.
